task.title: How to Unclog a Sink Using Baking Soda & Vinegar?
task.shortdesc: Household remedy guide that requires little to no cost to use for a clogged sink.

taskbody.context:
A commonly used solution that uses the chemical reaction from baking soda and vinegar to loosen down any debris or grime in the drain. Follow the guide to learn how to use this method.
Materials Needed:1 Cup of Vinegar1 Cup of Baking SodaPot / Kettle of Hot WaterMeasuring Cup

step.cmd: First, make to have the drain stopper already removed from the drainage hole. Then, heat up a pot / kettle of water and when ready, pour all the water into the drain.
Pour 1 cup of baking soda directly into the drain, allowing it to sit for about 5 minutes.
Afterwards, pour 1 cup of vinegar directly into the drain and let it sit for about 10 minutes.
While you wait, heat up another pot / kettle of water.
When 10 minutes is up, pour the water down the drain to wash away any remaining solution.

taskbody.result: Your drain should be back into working condition with no more debris and grime.
